selected_markets.title: Will the **high temp in Denver** be <54° on Feb 14, 2026?

valuations.rationale: Mid-probability of 6.5% seems underpriced for a high temp <54°F in Denver on Feb 14. Historical data shows Denver's Feb average high is ~47°F, making sub-54° outcomes reasonably common. Positive enrich_bias (3.52%) suggests market underestimation. Adjusted upward to ~7.2%, but confidence moderate due to weather volatility and specific date uncertainty.
